title: Human-AI Coexistence Systems
subtitle: Inclusive and sustainable manufacturing through human-centred AI and robotics
intro: Human-AI Coexistence Systems focuses on developing human-centred AI and robotic systems for manufacturing environments, where digital twins, shared autonomy, and collaborative intelligence enhance human work, safety, and global knowledge exchange.

vision.text: Enable manufacturing ecosystems where humans and intelligent systems collaborate through digital twins, shared autonomy, and cross-disciplinary knowledge exchange.

mission.text: Advance human-centred AI methodologies that integrate digital twins, collaborative robotics, and transdisciplinary innovation for sustainable and inclusive industry.

activities.title: Human-Centred AI & Human-Robot Collaboration
activities.text: Designing AI and robotics systems that support workers in production environments through adaptive assistance, digitalization of humans, robots, and environments, ergonomic optimization, shared autonomy, and cognitive augmentation.

activities.title: Mutual Learning & Transdisciplinary Innovation
activities.text: Developing and applying methods and methodologies for bridging cross-disciplinary barriers and advancing global talent development and collaborative innovation when designing and deploying AI & robotics technologies, with the goal of enabling their responsible and desirable adoption in real-world settings.

publications.title: Digital Twins and Human-Centred AI for Collaborative Manufacturing Systems

cta.title: Join the Research
cta.text: We welcome collaborations in human-centred AI, digital twins, robotics, and transdisciplinary innovation for sustainable manufacturing.
